items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United, Liverpool, Chelsea eye Bournemouth striker
items.summary: AFC Bournemouth striker Junior Kroupi has caught the eye of Manchester United, Liverpool, and Chelsea. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Liverpool's Hugo Ekitike suffers suspected Achilles rupture, set to miss World Cup with France
items.summary: Ekitike suffered the injury in the first half of Liverpool's defeat to Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Kohli not at 100% fitness but 'happy with my intensity'
items.summary: RCB opener came on as Impact Player and helped them win despite having been under the weather
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
